word: G1812 - ἑξακόσιοι - hexakósioi - hex-ak-os'-ee-oy - Six hundred

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἑξακόσιοι

- Transliteration: hexakosioi

- Phonetic: hex-ak-os'-ee-oy

- Definition:

1. six hundred

- Origin: plural ordinal from G1803 and G1540

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: Plural ordinal from G1803 and G1540; six hundred: - six hundred.
